user_goal: Create a Spawner mission from Telegram planning context for Spark Grants contracts, launch account choice, WL wording, and voice QA proof.
expected_agent_capability: Turn informal Telegram planning notes into a staged, reviewable Spark Grants mission with contract gates and launch-copy decisions.
success_examples: The mission recommends Spark_coded for v1 launch while keeping BookofAgents as a later reserved identity.
The mission blocks free WL language until the grants contract confirms no consideration is required.
The mission includes the four referenced voice QA proof commands without claiming live proof was already completed.
The mission creates a contract-pack task with legal review as a required gate.
failure_examples: The mission publishes or dispatches work automatically.
The mission tells the operator to say free WLs without a contract gate.
The mission creates or assumes ownership of BookofAgents.
The mission treats generated contract notes as final legal advice.
success_claim: Spark Grants launch planning can move forward with account, WL wording, contract, and voice proof gates captured before public execution.
